text.title: Voice UI Basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Voice UI Basics end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: author-prompts
step.action: Write ≤15-word prompts per intent and slot.

step.name: confirm-destructive
step.action: Mark destructive intents; add yes/no confirmation prompts.

step.name: test-with-voice
step.action: Run real-voice test in target environment.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit to the voice-spec store.
